body:
This simplifies some internals in the Hypsography interface, and adds support for HDF5 export.

Note that this is breaking, but since it isn't widely used (e.g. it isn't in ClimaAtmos yet), I think it should be okay. (@akshaysridhar is that okay?)

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: revamp hypsography for HDF5 support
